situation: audit-2026-07-08-045 finding PA-B2-M-005: distill.py run() calls save_persona_version then kv_set as two separate transactions. Crash between them leaves persona version saved but last_distill_at stale → next run re-distills same memories, producing duplicate/conflicting persona updates.
action: Added storage.kv_set_tx(conn, key, value) and storage._save_persona_version_tx(conn, ...) helpers that operate on an existing connection without auto-commit. Updated distill.py run() to wrap both operations in a single `with storage.connect() as conn:` block with explicit conn.commit(). File write (profile.json) still happens inside the txn but after DB writes — acceptable since file write is idempotent and DB is the source of truth.
outcome_evidence: Committed to opt-distill-1783392512, pushed to origin/auto/opt-distill-1783392512. Two new transactional helpers added (kv_set_tx, _save_persona_version_tx); distill.py run() now uses single connect() context with explicit commit.
next_suggestion: Dispatch next pending route-fix: PA-B2-M-006 (calendar.py LLM-fallback time range without ISO validation). After all 4 pending fixes dispatched, check merge status and transition to cycle-complete if all terminal.
